'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 8''' is the eighth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 8 was published in Summer [[1989]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Steve Spielberg: A Close Encounter With The Director Of ''Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade''" by [[Dan Madsen]]
*"Lost in the Mists of Time: The Muddled Myths of the Holy Grail" by [[Lisa E. Cowan]]
*"Inside ILM: ''Ghost Busters II''" by [[John S. Davis]]
